---
title: "Welcome"
listing:
  id: latest-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  max-items: 3
  categories: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Pulakesh Pradhan
### Geographer | GIS Specialist | Spatial Data Scientist
:::

## About Me

I am a geographer and spatial data scientist specialized in GIS and Remote Sensing.

## Latest Posts

::: {#latest-posts}
:::

[View all posts →](blog.qmd)
